login.title: Te tomoraa i roto i te hoa

login.privacyPolicy: Ture no te paruru i te taata

register.title: A hamani i te hoê parau

register.signUpWithMicrosoft: A tapa'o i ni'a ia Microsoft

register.privacyPolicy: Ture no te paruru i te taata
register.successMessage: Mauruuru no to outou tapa'oraa. No te faaohipa i ta outou aamu, a hi'o i ta outou rata uira e a pata i ni'a i te reni hi'opo'araa ta matou i hapono atu ia outou.
register.passwordsNoMatch: Aita te mau parau huna e tu'ati ra
register.passwordTooShort: E mea ti'a i te parau huna ia 6 a'e reta

twoFactor.title: Haapapûraa e piti tuhaa
twoFactor.descriptionCode: A papa'i i te numera e 6 numera i roto i ta outou faanahoraa haapapûraa
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: A papa'i i te hoê o ta outou mau numera no te tapa'o i roto
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: A papa'i i te hoê numera faaho'iraa mai (hoho'a : XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.invalidCode: A papa'i i te hoê numera e 6 numera
twoFactor.submit: A hi'opo'a e a tomo i roto
twoFactor.useAuthenticator: A faaohipa i te Authenticator App
twoFactor.useRecoveryCode: A faaohipa i te code no te faaho'iraa mai
twoFactor.helpText: Te fifi ra anei ? A farerei i te tauturu no te tauturu.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: E numera tano ore. A tamata faahou.

setup.subtitle: E faanaho ana'e ia outou. A ma'iti i ta outou huru tomoraa no te tamau noa.
setup.selectError: A ma'iti i te hoê huru afata
setup.clinicDescription: Te ti'a nei au no te hoê fare ma'i e aore râ no te hoê fare utuuturaa ma'i e rave rahi mau taote
setup.labDescription: Te ti'a nei au no te hoê piha hi'opo'araa e aore râ te hoê pû hi'opo'
setup.individualDescription: E taote e aore râ, e taata ma'imi vau
setup.setupError: Aita i oti i te faanahoraa. A tamata faahou.

messages.errorFallback: Aita i manuïa i te hapono i te rata uira no te faaapîraa. A tamata faahou.

success.title: A hi'o i ta outou rata uira
success.sentTo: Ua hapono matou i te hoê reni no te faaapîraa i te parau huna i {{email}}
success.description: A hi'o i ta outou afata rata e a pee i te mau arata'iraa no te faaapî i ta outou parau huna. E hope te tuatiraa i roto i te 1 hora.
success.retry: Aita i farii i te rata uira ? A tamata faahou

form.title: Ua mo'ehia ia oe ta oe parau huna ?
form.description: A papa'i i ta outou rata uira e e hapono atu matou i te hoê reni faaapîraa.
form.emailPlaceholder: A papa'i i ta outou rata uira
form.remember: Te haamana'o ra outou i ta outou parau huna ?

messages.passwordMismatch: Aita te mau parau huna e tu'ati ra
messages.requirementsMissing: A pahono i te mau titauraa atoa no te parau huna

success.title: Ua manuïa te faaapîraa i te parau huna

success.button: Haere i ni'a i te tomoraa

form.title: A faaapî i ta outou parau huna
form.description: A papa'i i ta outou parau huna apî i raro nei.
form.newPasswordPlaceholder: A papa'i i te parau huna apî

form.requirementsMet: Te faaî nei te parau huna i te mau titauraa atoa

messages.invalidLink: E tuatiraa haapapûraa tano ore. A faaohipa i te hono no roto mai i ta outou rata uira.
messages.successFallback: Ua haapapûhia ta outou rata uira ma te manuïa.
messages.errorFallback: Aita i haapapû i te rata uira. Ua hope paha te tuatiraa.

state.loadingDescription: A tia'i a hi'opo'a ai matou i ta outou rata uira...
state.successDescription: Ua hi'opo'a-maitai-hia ta outou rata uira.
state.errorDescription: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia haapapû i ta outou rata uira.

success.nextStep: I teie nei, e nehenehe ta outou e tomo i roto i ta outou tomoraa na roto i ta outou rata uira e ta outou parau huna.

error.helpText: Mai te mea e, e tamau noa te reira, a niuniu atu i te tauturu e aore râ, a tapa'o faahou.
